layman_headline: Crypto market is fearful and alt coins are bleeding — patience is the smartest play right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a 'Fear' state with a score of 26/100, and Bitcoin is dominating at 56.2%, which means money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin. Almost every swing candidate on the watchlist is below its key moving averages with bearish chart structures. While a few coins like ZRO are approaching oversold levels, none present a clean enough setup with a favorable risk/reward ratio to justify risking capital today.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines and keep your cash ready. Wait for the Fear & Greed index to dip further toward 'Extreme Fear' (below 20) or for a clear technical reversal pattern to form on a quality alt. Don't try to catch falling knives.
expert_reasoning: Across all nine swing candidates, the macro backdrop is hostile for altcoins: BTC dominance at 56.2% is pulling capital away from alts, and Fear & Greed at 26 is improving but not at extreme fear levels where contrarian entries have historically been most profitable (our signal credibility data shows Fear_Greed has a 75% win rate with +5.9% avg return, but that works best at extremes). LAB is down 95% in 7 days — that's a potential rug or catastrophic event, not a swing trade. ETHFI has the best chart bias (+0.60) with a bullish marubozu, but its risk/reward to nearest resistance is only 0.11x — terrible for a swing entry. ZRO's RSI at 31 is the most oversold candidate (our RSI signal has 67% win rate), but price is sitting right on $0.90 support with all MAs above — we need to see a confirmed bounce off this level before entering. VIRTUAL surged 13.4% in 24h but has a bearish chart bias of -0.70 and may already be extended. The prudent move is to wait.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.2% continues to crush altcoin performance — alts could bleed further even if BTC holds steady
Fear & Greed at 26 is improving but hasn't reached extreme fear levels (sub-15) where contrarian buys have highest probability
Multiple news sources reference bear market comparisons (2022 parallels) which could accelerate selling if BTC breaks below $63K
watch_list: ZRO holding $0.90 support — a confirmed bounce with a bullish engulfing candle would create a BUY setup
Fear & Greed index movement — a drop to sub-20 'Extreme Fear' would signal peak pessimism and better entry timing
BTC price action around $64K — a break above $65K could relieve alt pressure, while a drop below $62K would worsen conditions
market_context: The crypto market is in a fear phase with BTC dominance elevated at 56.2%, signaling capital flight from altcoins to Bitcoin. News headlines reference bear market parallels and institutional capital is flowing to competing assets like CoreWeave's $20B funding round rather than crypto.
context_banner: Altcoins are being punished by high BTC dominance and fearful sentiment — no candidate offers a clean risk/reward setup worthy of capital deployment today.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 26 (Fear) is improving from 23 yesterday but not at extreme levels where contrarian buys have historically yielded 75% win rate and +5.9% avg returns.
ZRO RSI at 31 is the most oversold candidate — our RSI signal has 67% win rate — but needs a confirmed bounce candle before entry.
Bitcoin described as 'nearing late stages of bear market' and traders still see BTC copying 2022 patterns, creating uncertainty for risk-on altcoin positions.
CoreWeave's $20B funding haul highlights competing demand for liquidity, potentially reducing crypto inflows in the near term.
ETH derivatives reset suggests positioning is being cleaned out — could set up a cleaner move once fear subsides, but not actionable yet.
